hero.title: Wuud.
hero.lede: Embossed wooden cladding for interior and exterior architecture. Real wood — birch, alder, aspen, pine — modified to hold deep relief, then finished natural, translucent or painted. Developed in Finland; brought to Denmark by Beyond Rational.

hero_note: Surfaces shown are an indicative rendering of the finish range. Final samples and patterns on request.

points.title: Embossed, not printed
points.body: A novel wood-modifying process presses pattern into the surface of real timber — true depth that catches light and throws shadow. Standard patterns or fully custom.

points.title: Inside and out
points.body: The same modification that forms the relief weatherproofs the wood and adds fire retardancy — so one panel language runs from interior walls to building façades.

points.title: From Finnish research
points.body: Developed out of a Business Finland & Aalto University research programme. Conscious, contemporary cladding — now available through Beyond Rational in Denmark.

gallery_head.body: Finishes, patterns and panels in situ. Images are managed in the CMS — add or replace them at /admin.

cta.lede: Want Wuud panels, patterns and pricing for a project? Tell us the brief and we'll send finishes, formats and a quote.
